chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1872 of 2025 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For order on office objection No.1 to 7. 2.For hearing of Misc.No.9283/2025 3.For hearing of main case. 23.05.2025 Mr.Ahmed Ali Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioners. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Mr.Abdul Razzak, Advocate for Respondent No.1 Mr.Hassan Abidi, Advocate for Respondent No.2 (KMC) Mr.Jehangir Kalhoro, Advocate for Respondent No.8 (TMC) Under instructions learned counsel for the concerned respondent states that the applications of the petitioners received on 17.04.2025 available at pages 373 and 377 of the Court file, shall be decided vide speaking order after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners. He further states that pending aforesaid no installation/construction of any hoardings etc. shall be permitted in the subject property. In view hereof learned counsel for the petitioners states that the petition appears to have served its purpose and may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
